description:
Compare the drug-drug interactions of two aldosterone antagonists—'Spironolactone' and 'Eplerenone'—with the prostate cancer drug 'Abiraterone' using the Liverpool Cancer iChart app. Determine which antagonist is safer to use with Abiraterone, considering Green or Yellow status safer than Red or Orange. Create a JSON file at '/sdcard/safety_check.json' with the following structure:

{
  "cancer_drug": "abiraterone",
  "safer_drug": "name_of_safer_drug",
  "safer_drug_color": "color_code",
  "unsafe_drug_color": "color_code"
}

Use lowercase for colors (e.g., 'red', 'green').
